channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Posts missing, 24th June
item.description:
After many requests for the posts to be reinstated at this point to stop parking and people driving on pavement and parking wardens unable to find the perpetrators maybe they should use the evidence that has been provided or just ignore the problem and hope it goes away after numerous conversations with your representative it would seem that you just don’t want to know you just want the council rates to put up post at cray station and Beckenham sod the rest of us roll on the next council elections
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 91, Cray Avenue, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Matteress and wooded framed left outside electrical cupboard, 24th June
item.description:
Item have been left outside electrical cupbard nesr bin stor not sure if it was a resosddnt but it been there for over week now. A lit cigarett bud could land on it and set it a lit or extreme heat could cause it to go up in flame being outside a electrical cupboard if caught on fire it can explode It a hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside no 4 Morpeth Grove E9 7LE, 24th June
item.description:
Additionally a mattress has been put on the communal bins but the fly tipping must have happened in the middle of the night and is a disgrace. Please can this be moved, thank you!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morpeth Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin overflowing London bridge, 24th June

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duke Street Hill, The Borough, Greater London

item.title: Overhanging willow tree branch, 24th June
item.description:
The branch is low hanging and dangerous it overhangs the pavement and the road. It’s on the extreme edge of the council owned field. I have a high sided van that gets battery about every time I drive to my house in Tile Kiln Lane. The tree is a Willow tree
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tile Kiln Lane, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cover missing from water access poi t, 24th June
item.description:
It looks as if the cover has broken or collapsed and fallen into the underground water cut- off area. Is a trip Hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fortune Place, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin full, 24th June
item.description:
As above
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, South Eden Park Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping near to Penge East Dry Cleaner, 226 Venner Road, 24th June
item.description:
This area has only been clear for a couple of days; a new pile of rubbish - a vacuum cleaner, children's high chairs, plastic boxes and lids - have now been left around the clothes deposit bin. It is really unpleasant to have to walk past such unsightly rubbish whenever I leave home or return there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 226, Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The tree block the view for cross the road, 24th June
item.description:
The tree block the view for cross the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree pulling up my drive, 24th June
item.description:
On going g since 2022 do I have to now get in touch with local mp as now getting worse
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38,40, St. Andrew's Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflowing, 24th June
item.description:
Bin overflowing with countless bags of waste. Please either empty more regularly or REMOVE ALTOGETHER

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Maberley Road, South Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Utility equipment on pavement, 24th June
item.description:
Utility equipment, large metal road sign and traffic cones encumbering pavement. This is left behind after recent works in that location. It has been more than a week since work was completed. These items seemingly forgotten/left behind.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Riverdale Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The street lamp is on Lodge road and on the garden frontage of Blackthorns, 24th June
item.description:
I reported this a few months ago. I informed you that the light was not working and that the door to electrics at the base was open. The door was fixed but the light was not. I am a 75 year old pensioner. It has become dangerous as a trip hazard with the light not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lodge Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked pavement, 24th June
item.description:
Enfield Food Centre again blocking footpath by trading from public pavement Issue reported previously but obviously ignored Large pallet crates on pavement together with shopping baskets and piles of cardboard rubbish Major encroachment onto public footpath which is being copied by most stores to Turkey Street Despite councils warning letters traders blatantly ignoring and trading beyond their premises boundaries onto public pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hertford Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: It dont recognise a car to turn right, 24th June
item.description:
Traffic light turning right on to streatham common north it doesn't recognise any vehicles. to change into. please fix traffic light asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Streatham Common North, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven + damaged pavement around large tree - tripping hazard., 24th June
item.description:
Report number 9525036 dated 29/5/26. I had a bad accident when I fell over the uneven foliage laden footpath. I pinpointed on your map where this took place as requested. Your workmen repaired the pavement outside my property - the other end of the road. Obviously all the items on this report were ignored as the wrong pavement was repaired.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexandra Crescent, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass pane dumped here, 24th June
item.description:
Looks to be from a shower screen, can council attend and remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded mattress and bags of rubbish, 24th June
item.description:
Mattress and bags of rubbish dumped outside 66 Knollys Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68, Knollys Road, West Norwood, Greater London
